title.en: From Slices to Objects: Structural Differences in Go and Java Memory Usage Models
title.zh: 从切片到对象：Go 与 Java 内存使用模型的结构性差异

summary.en: A comparative analysis of how Go and Java differ in data representation, arrays, slices, object layout, parameter passing, escape analysis, GC, runtime design, and engineering tradeoffs.
summary.zh: 围绕 Go 与 Java 的内存使用模型，分析二者在数据表示、数组、切片、对象模型、函数传参、逃逸分析、GC 与运行时能力上的结构性差异。

readingDirection.en: Read this when comparing Go and Java for infrastructure services, memory-sensitive workloads, or runtime-level engineering tradeoffs.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在比较 Go 与 Java 的基础设施服务选型、内存敏感场景和运行时工程取舍时阅读。
